import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut a_str = ""
mut b_str = ""
mut s_str = ""
mut t = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(byte_val)
    if byte_val == 32 or byte_val == 9 or byte_val == 10 or byte_val == 13
      if t == 0 and string.len(a_str) > 0
        t = 1
      else if t == 1 and string.len(b_str) > 0
        t = 2
      else if t == 2 and string.len(s_str) > 0
        t = 3
      end
    else
      if t == 0
        a_str = "#{a_str}#{string.from_byte(byte_val)}"
      else if t == 1
        b_str = "#{b_str}#{string.from_byte(byte_val)}"
      else if t == 2
        s_str = "#{s_str}#{string.from_byte(byte_val)}"
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let a = match string.parse_int(a_str)
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  0
end

let b = match string.parse_int(b_str)
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  0
end

let s = match string.parse_int(s_str)
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  1
end

mut out = ""
mut cur = a
mut first = true
while cur < b
  if first
    out = "#{cur}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{cur}"
  end
  cur = cur + s
end

println(out)
